files_deleted: src/clauded/roles/ (25 *-ubuntu dirs renamed to bare names)
implementation_summary: git rm -r 19 stale bare role dirs (aws_cli, c, dart, docker, gh, go, gradle, java, kotlin, maven, mongodb, mysql, playwright, poetry, postgresql, redis, rust, sqlite, uv).
git mv 25 *-ubuntu role dirs to bare names (opencode-ubuntu -> opencode).
provisioner.py: Removed _ROLES_WITH_VARIANTS frozenset and _apply_distro_suffix() method. Updated run() to use _get_base_roles() directly with bare names.

test_provisioner.py: Removed _ROLES_WITH_VARIANTS from imports. Deleted TestProvisionerApplyDistroSuffix class entirely (Story 04 skips honored). Deleted test_opencode_alpine_raises (Story 04 skip honored). Deleted test_play_includes_roles (Story 04 skip honored). Deleted test_opencode_added_to_roles_with_variants. Fixed validate_roles_exist tests to use bare names. Fixed test_common_role_exists to use bare 'common'. Replaced all 24 remaining _apply_distro_suffix() calls with _get_base_roles() directly.
Verified wheel build: 25 bare role dirs in artifact, no suffixed dirs.
